title: Call Centre Work 2005
description: The data consist of theme interviews of employees and supervisors working in call centres. The main themes were employee commitment and interaction between staff members. Other topics included gender issues, pay and its significance for employment choice, customer relations, feedback, employee-management relations, and recruitment processes. The interviews were conducted in three call centre enterprises with locations in different parts of Finland. Several different interview shedules were used,
license: In accordance with the agreement between FSD and the depositor.
